basic_details.short_information: Basmati Export Development Foundation (BEDF) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 30 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BEDF Consultant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Agriculture/ Horticulture/ Food Science/ Biological science/ Food Technology/ Chemistry or Biochemistry
qualification.details: Consultant (Quality): M.Sc in Agriculture/ Horticulture/ Food Science/ Biological science/ Food Technology/ Chemistry or Biochemistry or Microbiology or Dairy Chemistry or any other equivalent qualification. Minimum 15 years experience in handling regulations for export of Agricultural products, Implementation of Food Safety Management Systems (FSMS). Desirable: PhD in the concerned field. Experience in addressing pesticide residue and other contaminants/hazards in food, Food Safety and Quality compliance for exports, knowledge on analytical requirements for export.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BEDF Consultant (Quality) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the BEDF Consultant (Quality) recruitment is 22nd June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant (Quality) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc in Agriculture, Horticulture, Food Science, Biological Science, Food Technology, Chemistry, Biochemistry, Microbiology, Dairy Chemistry, or an equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are required for the Consultant (Quality) position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 15 years of experience is required in handling regulations for export of Agricultural products and implementation of Food Safety Management Systems (FSMS).

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Consultant (Quality) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant (Quality) post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant (Quality) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 1,20,000 to Rs. 1,50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply by sending their complete application along with required documents via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the BEDF Consultant (Quality) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Consultant (Quality) position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Basmati Export Development Foundation located?
faq.answer: The Basmati Export Development Foundation is located in New Delhi, Delhi.
